title: Custom Supernatant Removal and PrestoBlue Test
author: Opentrons

steps.title: **Updated** This protocol has been updated...
steps.instruction: **Updated** This protocol has been updated based on feedback from the user. This protocol is part five of a larger workflow. The entire workflow can be found below Part 1: [Small Molecule Library Prep](./1adec6) Part 2: [Seed Cells](./1adec6-2) Part 3: [Transfer Small Molecules](./1adec6-3) Part 4: [Transfer Small Molecules - CSV Input](./1adec6-4) Part 5: [Custom Supernatant Removal](./1adec6-5) Part 6: [ProcartaPlex Protocol-1](./1adec6-6) Part 7: [ProcartaPlex Protocol-2](./1adec6-7) In this protocol, the [P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2)](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/8-Channel-electronic-pipette) transfers 220µL of supernatant from source plate containing cells to a destination plate. Once complete, the [P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2)](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/8-Channel-electronic-pipette) will transfer 100µL of Cell medium+10% PrestoBlue to the original source plate. Explanation of complex parameters below: * **P300-Multi Mount**: Select which mount the P300-Multi Pipette is attached to. * **Aspirate from Well Bottom Height**: Specify the height from the bottom of the well (in mm) that the pipette will aspirate supernatant (note: default height is 1mm from bottom). * **Perform 2nd aliquot**: Specify whether or not to perform a second aliquot (110µL transferred to plate in slot 5) ---

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will pick up tips
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will pick up tips.

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer...
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer 220µL of supernatant from Column 1 of the Source Plate to Column 1 of the Destination Plate.

steps.title: If performing the second aliquot, the...
steps.instruction: If performing the second aliquot, the P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer 100µL of supernatant from Column 1 of the Source Plate to Column 1 of the Second Destination Plate.

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop...
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop used tips in the waste bin.

steps.title: Steps 1-4 will be repeated for columns 2-10
steps.instruction: Steps 1-4 will be repeated for columns 2-10.

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will pick up tips
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will pick up tips.

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will mix...
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will mix Cell medium+10% PrestoBlue, then transfer 100µL of Cell medium+10% PrestoBlue to Column 1 of the Source Plate (dispensing at the top of the well).

steps.title: Step 7 will be repeated for...
steps.instruction: Step 7 will be repeated for columns 2-10 of the Source Plate.

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop...
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop used tips in the waste bin.
